description: Each elective patient scheduled at most once; urgent patients must be scheduled
OR daily open time (including cleaning) not exceeded
Assigned surgeon specialty matches patient specialty_required
At least 2 nurses per surgery (scrub + circulator)
Cardiac surgery only in room with bypass machine
Pediatric surgery only in pediatric-equipped room
30-min cleaning gap between surgeries (absorbed as +30 per case)
ICU-requiring patients on day d <= icu_beds[d]
Maximize number of elective patients scheduled
Minimize total cleaning overhead (fewer but longer cases preferred)
Prefer requested_surgeon for patients with preferences
Minimize pediatric-room use for non-pediatric cases
